name: Chewy Brownie Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 Cups HERSHEY'S Semi-Sweet Chocolate Chips (12 oz pkg)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Line a baking sheet with foil.
3. In a large bowl, beat together Crisco, brown sugar, water, and vanilla extract until well blended.
4. Add eggs; beat until well combined.
5. Stir together flour, cocoa, salt, and baking soda.
6. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, beating on low speed just until blended.
7. Stir in chocolate chips.
8. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough 2 inches apart onto the prepared cookie sheet.
9. Bake for 7-9 minutes, or until set but still moist.
10. Remove from oven and let cool on foil for 2 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
11. Makes about 3 dozen cookies.
